status.processingDescription: Please wait while we process your video
status.readyDescription: All requirements met. You can start processing.
status.setupDescription: Please select a template and upload video files

requirements.title: Before you can start processing:
requirements.uploadFile: Upload at least one video file

tips.title: Processing Tips
tips.keepTabActive: Keep this tab active during processing
tips.largerFiles: Larger files will take longer to process
tips.monitorProgress: You can monitor progress in real-time
tips.inBrowser: Processing happens entirely in your browser

complete.title: Processing Complete!
complete.description: Your video has been processed and is ready for download.

success.title: Video Processing Complete!
success.local: All processing was done locally in your browser
success.noData: No data was sent to external servers
success.downloadShare: You can download and share your video now

share.title: Processed Video
share.text: Check out this video I created with FFmpeg Video Composer!
